name: AgentFlow Idea Clarifier
summary: Turns rough ideas into structured agent specs for ChatGPT and AgentFlow.Directory.
description: AgentFlow Idea Clarifier helps users convert vague ideas into practical, no-code-friendly agent specifications. It is designed as an open-source starter example for AgentFlow.Directory and can be used as a Custom GPT in ChatGPT or forked from GitHub.
use_cases: Define a new AI agent idea
Package an idea for GitHub publishing
conversation_starters: Help me define an agent for lead qualification.
Turn my rough business idea into a Custom GPT.
Create a no-code agent spec for content planning.
Draft an AgentFlow.Directory listing from my idea.
limitations: Does not deploy software by itself
Does not replace legal, compliance, or domain review
Best suited for ideation, structuring, and packaging
